title: Smoky Syrian Eggplant Casserole
description: A smoky, chewy casserole that captures the flavors of Syria in a lazy Sunday dinner with low‑sodium seasoning and a simple all‑purpose spice blend.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine eggplant, tomatoes, onion, and garlic with olive oil, all-purpose seasoning, smoked paprika, black pepper, and a pinch of salt, tossing until vegetables are coated.
Spread half the vegetable mixture in an oiled baking dish.
Top with the remaining vegetables and pour tomato sauce evenly over the layer.
Cover dish with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil, stir gently, and bake uncovered for an additional 10 minutes until vegetables are tender and slightly caramelized.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the casserole before serving.
Let rest 5 minutes, then serve hot as a hearty dinner.
